title: Handbrake not properly engaged? Elderly woman crushed to death by Thar in UP
description: A tragic accident in Farrukhabad, Uttar Pradesh, claimed the life of a 75-year-old woman. While closing a gate for an SUV, she was crushed against a wall when the vehicle unexpectedly rolled backward. CCTV footage captured the harrowing moments. Authorities suspect the handbrake may not have been fully engaged, leading to the fatal incident.

title: Iran FM Araghchi warns of contamination risk after U.S.-Israeli strikes on Bushehr nuclear power plant
description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi warned that continued attacks on the plant on Iran's southern coast could eventually lead to radioactive fallout that would "end life in GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) capitals, not Tehran"; Bushehr is considerably closer to Kuwait, Bahrain and Qatar than it is to the Iranian capital.

While significant material damage was reported, authorities confirmed no casualties. Kuwaiti air defenses intercepted incoming threats as part of Iran's ongoing offensive across the Gulf.

This aims to create a strong pipeline of red-ball cricketers. Coaches and selectors will prioritize Test development. Emerging and India A teams will tour Sri Lanka for four-day games.

title: ‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ eyes Rs 1,600 crore worldwide
description: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' continues its impressive box office run, nearing the Rs 1000 crore mark domestically. The spy thriller has grossed over Rs 1550 crore worldwide, with strong weekend performances bolstering its overall collection. The film is currently enjoying its third weekend in theaters.

title: Courier parcels from France, Belgium fuelled drug racket across Indian cities
description: Telangana investigators have busted a Nigeria-linked drug syndicate using European courier routes, primarily France and the Netherlands, to smuggle cocaine into India. A key operative, Nigerian national Iwuala Udoka Stanley, was arrested, revealing a pan-India distribution network supplying drugs to major cities and smaller towns. The probe uncovered a choreographer who received large cocaine consignments from Europe.

title: ‘Getting better every day’: Cristiano Ronaldo shares recovery update on hamstring injury

description: In a heartbreaking turn of events, a rewilded tiger that had found its way back to the wilds of Satpura National Park faced a horrific fate at the hands of poachers. Investigators discovered that the majestic creature was first lured with poisoned bait laced with urea and then met its demise through electrocution.

title: 'Credit to Dhruv Jurel': Inside RR's Jofra Archer move that turned the game vs GT
description: Parag said he had a different plan initially but changed it after Jurel’s input. "I was actually going to switch the order but credit to Jurel - he asked me to go with Jofra for the 19th. Wanted to go as fast as possible and as straight as possible," Parag said after the match.

description: US President Donald Trump claims "many of Iran's military leaders" were "terminated" in a major Tehran strike, sharing explosion footage without specifics. This follows Iran's missile attacks on Gulf states, Iraq, and Israel, and the downing of a US F-15 jet. Both nations have exchanged threats and carried out attacks, raising concerns of war crimes.

description: Prime Minister Modi announced the women's reservation law will be implemented from the 2029 Lok Sabha polls, urging women to pressure the opposition for unopposed passage. He refuted claims that southern states would lose seats due to population control, stating the government will increase Lok Sabha constituencies to accommodate the 33% quota for women.

title: Himanta vows free LPG cylinders for puja, Bihu; code violation, says Congress
description: Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma announced free LPG cylinders for Bihu and Durga Puja during a poll rally, promising one cylinder for each festival if the BJP returns to power. The announcement came amidst reports of long queues at gas distributors. The Congress criticized the move as a violation of the model code of conduct.

The TMC has demanded the official's removal and legal action, citing a breach of neutrality and the model code of conduct. They argue his actions pose a serious threat to free and fair elections.

title: Trump administration files emergency motion to resume ballroom work, citing security issues
description: Judge Richard Leon’s decision has left ‌the executive mansion “open and exposed” and is “threatening grave ‌national-security harms ⁠to the White House, the President and ⁠his family, and the President’s staff.”

title: 1 dead, 3 rescued as 10-year-old lodge collapses in Madhya Pradesh’s Anuppur
description: A four-storey building collapsed near the bus stand in Kotma, Anuppur, Madhya Pradesh, killing one person and injuring three others who were rescued. The nearly 10-year-old lodge crumbled around 5:30 pm, trapping guests, staff, and labourers. Excavation work in an adjacent house is suspected to have weakened the structure, prompting an inquiry by the district administration.

title: Lok Sabha seats for southern states won't be reduced, says PM Modi
description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi assured southern states that their Lok Sabha seats would be protected, even as the total number of seats might increase nationally. He also criticized Kerala's LDF and UDF for alleged "fake hostility" and targeting the Sabarimala temple, promising action if NDA forms the government.

Chasing 211, they fell short in the final over, with Rashid praising Tushar Deshpande’s “exceptional yorkers” for sealing the game.

They asserted the family's constitutional right to perform last rites, even as a magisterial inquiry is underway. Legislators also called for a judicial probe and a government statement on the incident.

OpenClaw creator, who Sam Altman hired for millions, reacts to Anthropic banning his AI Agent
description: Anthropic has stopped supporting OpenClaw for its Claude subscriptions. This decision follows a recent leak of Anthropic's Claude Code source code. Anthropic cites increased demand and usage patterns of third-party tools as reasons for the change. Subscribers will receive credits and can purchase discounted usage bundles. OpenClaw's creator expressed disappointment but acknowledged efforts to mitigate the impact.

‘This has happened before’: How science explains Déjà Vu and the feeling of life on replay
description: An uncanny feeling of having lived a moment before, known as déjà vu, is explored by scientists. This sensation, often dismissed as a trick of the mind, is now understood as a healthy brain's 'fact-checking' mechanism detecting a mismatch between familiarity and reality. Researchers suggest it reveals much about memory and perception.

Amid job cuts, Canadian billionaire Kevin O’Leary points out a good thing about AI layoffs
description: Kevin O'Leary, the Canadian billionaire, asserts that artificial intelligence is elevating human creativity, making artists and storytellers more valuable than ever. He highlights how compelling social media content, especially short-form videos, now commands significant salaries due to measurable customer acquisition. O'Leary believes AI is a powerful productivity tool, fostering new industries and opportunities across all economic sectors.

title: Reason the 6am email from 'Oracle leadership' told thousands of laid-off employees
description: Oracle has begun its largest-ever round of layoffs, with employees receiving termination emails from "Oracle Leadership" at 6AM saying their roles had been eliminated after "careful consideration of Oracle's current business needs." Around 10,000 employees have reportedly been cut so far, with estimates suggesting the total could reach 30,000. The email gave employees a narrow window to act before systems were deactivated.

title: Stephen Curry, Ayesha Curry join $150b mogul in heartwarming move
description: Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry have joined Warren Buffett in reviving his iconic charity lunch through a new auction titled “A Seat At The Table.” The initiative blends Buffett’s legacy in philanthropy with the Currys’ growing influence beyond basketball. With proceeds benefiting the Glide Foundation and Eat. Learn. Play. Foundation, the event aims to create meaningful change in underserved communities. Scheduled for June 24 in Omaha, the auction reflects a powerful collaboration focused on impact, purpose, and long-term community support.
